calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Successor Trustee And Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Smoot & Erica Gonzalez for and with Richard Ragan.

The Court asked if counsel had additional argument regarding the examiner's notes. Ms. Gonzalez stated that they would like to point out the error in the notes, that the date of death is incorrect, that there is inconsistency regarding the Comcast account, that it should be subject to general assignment, that Verizon & Vodaphone are the same account (Verizon bought out Vodaphone) and that there is no change in ownership of Aegon. Mr. Smoot stated that he is in agreement. The Petition to confirm successor trustee and assets to trust was taken under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
